name: Bhai Sujan Singh (Delhi)
body: At the moment we do not have much information about Bhai Sujan Singh Ji. Originally from Bombay, Bhai Sujan Singh moved to Delhi and performed Kirtan regularly at Gurdwara Sees Ganj Sahib. He used to accompany many Raagis on the side harmonium such as Bhai Amar Singh Ji and others. He was a very talented singer and blessed with a melodious voice. Unfortunately, he passed away too soon while only in his 40s. If anyone has a photo or more recordings of Bhai Sujan Singh Ji, please contact us.

tracks.name: Bhai Sujan Singh (Delhi) – Asa Ki Vaar (Partial)
